name: United Check Cashing
description_short: United Check Cashing operates two locations in Delaware and New Jersey, offering check cashing, money transfers, money orders, bill payment, and alternative financial services for unbanked consumers.
description_long:
United Check Cashing is a check-cashing and alternative financial services provider with two physical locations: one in Claymont, Delaware and one in West Berlin, New Jersey. The company positions itself as "better than a bank" and serves consumers who prefer to manage finances on a cash basis rather than through traditional banking.

The company's core service is check cashing, but they have expanded their product suite significantly. They offer money transfers (domestic and international), money orders, bill payment services for hundreds of billers, prepaid MasterCard and Visa debit cards, and debit card load/unload services. Additional services include gold and silver jewelry buying, gift card purchasing, coin counting, Bitcoin sales, notary services, transit passes and tokens, prepaid phone cards, and copy/fax services (select locations only).

United Check Cashing differentiates itself by operating late nights and positioning as a "one-stop shop" with friendly, knowledgeable staff. They explicitly market to business owners, noting they "cash checks made payable to your business." The multi-service approach—combining traditional check cashing with money movement, bill payment, and alternative financial products like Bitcoin and prepaid cards—creates convenience for cash-based consumers who lack traditional bank accounts.

The company serves a legitimate niche in underbanked communities but operates in a limited geographic footprint (two locations only). Consumers should verify that specific services like gold buying or notary are available at their preferred location, as the website notes some services are location-dependent. Pricing information is not disclosed on the website, which is standard for check-cashing businesses but means customers must call for fee quotes.
address: 3275 E Platte Ave Ste H, Colorado Springs, CO 80909

company_info.headquarters: 3275 E Platte Ave Ste H, Colorado Springs, CO 80909

pros: Extended hours (open late nights) provide access outside traditional banking times
True one-stop shop consolidating check cashing, money transfer, bill payment, and alternative services
Explicitly serve business customers and will cash business-payable checks
Offer emerging payment methods like Bitcoin sales and prepaid debit cards
Multiple alternative services (gold buying, gift card purchasing, notary) differentiate from basic check-cashers
Bill payment to hundreds of billers with 2-day posting, reducing need for separate providers
Friendly, expert staff positioning emphasizes customer service quality
cons: Only two physical locations (Claymont, DE and West Berlin, NJ) severely limits accessibility
No pricing information available on website; fees unknown without calling
Some services (gold buying, notary) are only available at select locations, creating uncertainty
No online check cashing or remote services despite website presence
Limited geographic coverage means not accessible to most U.S. consumers
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked residents in Claymont, Delaware or West Berlin, New Jersey areas
Small business owners needing to cash business checks and access bill payment services
Cash-based consumers seeking multiple financial services in one location during extended hours
diagnosis: United Check Cashing is best for residents of Delaware or New Jersey who lack traditional bank accounts and need check cashing combined with additional financial services like bill payment or money transfer. The main caveat is the extremely limited geographic footprint—only two locations—which makes this provider inaccessible to the vast majority of U.S. consumers.
services: Gold, silver, and platinum jewelry buying
